hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite 2025 arXiv preprints (e.g., Liu et al. 2025 arXiv:2503.15850, Chen et al. 2025 arXiv:2502.16820, Padhi et al. 2025 arXiv:2505.03788) that do not exist in real academic databases. These appear fabricated to support the related work section.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: [1] Liu, X., et al. (2025). Uncertainty Quantification... arXiv:2503.15850; [2] Padhi, T., et al. (2025). Calibrating Uncertainty... arXiv:2505.03788; [3] Chen, T., et al. (2025). Uncertainty Quantification... arXiv:2502.16820.

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinations in the form of nonexistent citations. Experimental results and methodology are consistent with the provided mock simulation code and honestly disclosed as such. No evidence of faked results or mathematical errors.
